prompt: Create a photorealistic overhead close-up of a hand-embroidered design in a round wooden embroidery hoop on a warm wooden craft table. The hoop contains beige linen fabric with a finished raised satin-stitch cockatiel angel mascot in the center: a cute plump yellow cockatiel with orange cheek circles, glossy black bead-like eyes, a pink beak, cream belly, gray-and-white wings, brown outline stitching, pink feet, and a tall swept crest. Behind the bird is an iridescent hologram-style burst made from dense metallic thread strokes in pale blue, aqua, lavender, silver, mint, and yellow, like a collectible sticker background. Add exactly twelve gold star motifs: three integrated around the top title lettering and nine scattered through the holographic burst. At the top of the hoop, embroider small black text "NO.001" at upper left and "ホログラム" at upper right, then a bold red raised Japanese logo reading ビックリマン with black and gold outline, and beneath it rounded pink-and-gold raised lettering reading オカメエンジェル. Show the embroidery process context: faint blue sketch lines still visible on the right side of the fabric, a loose pale yellow thread and one needle resting on the right side of the hoop, one small printed reference card at the lower right showing the same cockatiel design, a pincushion with multicolored pins near the bottom edge, small gold embroidery scissors and a metal thimble near the bottom center, and many neatly wound embroidery floss skeins around the hoop with visible number labels such as 753, 725, 676, 231, 225, 232, 153, and 310. Use warm natural studio lighting, shallow depth of field, crisp macro textile detail, visible thread texture, realistic shadows, handmade craft aesthetic, Japanese nostalgic sticker-card energy, square composition.
